text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper is a real publication, and the discrepancy in the author's name is a minor naming variation (adding "Jr") that does not indicate fabrication. The paper appears as a chapter in the book "Drawing Inferences from Self-Selected Samples".
LINK: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-4612-4976-4_7
FOUND_TITLE: Alternative Methods for Solving the Problem of Selection Bias in Evaluating the Impact of Treatments on Outcomes
FOUND_AUTHORS: James J. Heckman, Richard Robb
FOUND_YEAR: 1986
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
